tender.description: Nagar Palika Parishad Khalilabad ke ward gorkhal Me bechan, Vikki Chaudhary, sanjay ke ghar hote huve Aadharsh Srivastava, vinay ke ghar tak rambriksh ke ghar se rahul, savar ke ghar se ramjan and vishvkarma ke plat tak road and nali nirman karya 17
